description_long: This object depicts a futuristic police officer dressed in advanced tactical gear. The figure wears a dark armored suit with reinforced padding on the chest, shoulders, and legs, and a high-tech helmet with a visor that covers the upper face. The uniform includes a tactical vest with visible pouches and a holstered firearm strapped to the right thigh. The arms are covered with long, fitted sleeves and gloves, while the legs feature knee guards and sturdy boots. Subtle details such as a name tag, insignia patch, and communication devices are integrated into the uniform, suggesting a modern or near-future law enforcement role.
description: A futuristic police officer in dark tactical armor, helmet, and utility gear with a holstered firearm and visible insignia.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full armored suit, helmet with visor, tactical vest, and holstered firearm on the right thigh.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, arm armor, and the holstered firearm's position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, backpack-like attachment, and reinforced leg protection.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the arm and leg armor, helmet shape, and utility belt details.
attribute_uniform_type: Futuristic tactical police uniform with armored dark green shirt and pants, long sleeves, reinforced vest, and utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Full-cover tactical helmet with integrated visor, dark color, and reinforced structure.
